---
title : Figure 10.3
subtitle : Boosting
author : Thimoté Dupuch
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate("../.."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra, SpecialFunctions
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
function boosting_lasso(X, y, Xtest, ytest, maxiter)
    n, d = size(X)
    beta = zeros(d)
    u = zeros(n)
    betas = zeros(d, maxiter)
    perftrain = zeros(maxiter)
    perftest = zeros(maxiter)

    for iter in 1:maxiter
        betas[:, iter] = beta
        perftrain[iter] = mean((y .- X * beta).^2)
        perftest[iter] = mean((ytest .- Xtest * beta).^2)

        grad = u .- y
        Xtg = X' * grad
        b = argmax(abs.(Xtg))

        betaloc = zeros(d)
        betaloc[b] = X[:, b]' * grad > 0 ? -1.0 : 1.0

        uloc = X * betaloc
        alpha = -dot(uloc, grad) / dot(uloc, uloc)

        u .+= uloc .* alpha
        beta .+= betaloc .* alpha
    end
    return perftrain, perftest, betas
end

# --- Simulation ---

d, n, ntest, k = 1000, 100, 1000, 5
sigma_noise = 0.5
maxiter = 50

X = randn(n, d)
Xtest = randn(ntest, d)
beta_ast = zeros(d)
beta_ast[1:k] = sign.(randn(k))

# Sparse case
y = X * beta_ast .+ sigma_noise * randn(n)
ytest = Xtest * beta_ast .+ sigma_noise * randn(ntest)
train_sp, test_sp, betas_sp = boosting_lasso(X, y, Xtest, ytest, maxiter)

# Non-sparse case
temp = randn(d, d)
U = eigvecs(Symmetric(temp + temp'))
beta_ast_ns = U * beta_ast

y = X * beta_ast_ns .+ sigma_noise * randn(n)
ytest = Xtest * beta_ast_ns .+ sigma_noise * randn(ntest)
train_ns, test_ns, betas_ns = boosting_lasso(X, y, Xtest, ytest, maxiter)

# --- Plotting ---

iters = 0:maxiter-1
fig = Figure(size=(1200, 1000))

ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], title="Errors - sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="log(errors)")
lines!(ax1, iters, log.(train_sp), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax1, iters, log.(test_sp), color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax1, position=:rt)
xlims!(ax1, 0, maxiter-1); ylims!(ax1, -5, 3)

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], title="Weights - sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="weights")
lines!(ax2, iters, permutedims(betas_sp), linewidth=2) # Transposed to 50x1000
xlims!(ax2, 0, maxiter-1); ylims!(ax2, -1.2, 1.2)

ax3 = Axis(fig[2, 1], title="Errors - non sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="log(errors)")
lines!(ax3, iters, log.(train_ns), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax3, iters, log.(test_ns), color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax3, position=:rt)
xlims!(ax3, 0, maxiter-1); ylims!(ax3, -5, 3)

ax4 = Axis(fig[2, 2], title="Weights - non sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="weights")
lines!(ax4, iters, permutedims(betas_ns), linewidth=2) # Transposed to 50x1000
xlims!(ax4, 0, maxiter-1); ylims!(ax4, -1.2, 1.2)

fig
```
